ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hourly_data" (
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hour */,
  "hour_ending" TEXT /* Hour ending time */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the data */,
  "coast" REAL /* Coast region data */,
  "east" REAL /* East region data */,
  "far_west" REAL /* Far West region data */,
  "north" REAL /* North region data */,
  "north_central" REAL /* North Central region data */,
  "south" REAL /* South region data */,
  "south_central" REAL /* South Central region data */,
  "west" REAL /* West region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_demand" (
  "demand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demand entry */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "demand" REAL /* Demand value */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Forecast accuracy */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality flag */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_demand_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_demand_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hourly_data ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_supply" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply entry */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "supply" REAL /* Supply value */,
  "generation_type" TEXT /* Type of generation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality flag */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_supply_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hourly_data ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_supply_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_price" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "price" REAL /* Price value */,
  "price_type" TEXT /* Type of price */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality flag */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_price_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hourly_data ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_price_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hourly_data ("hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "hour_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hour */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_hour_id FOREIGN KEY ("hour_id") REFERENCES hourly_data ("hour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Metadata key */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Metadata value */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "metadata_date" TEXT /* Date the metadata was created or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the version was uploaded */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the version */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notif_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Report name */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Who the report was shared with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecast value */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outages" (
  "outage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outage entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "outage_date" TEXT /* Date of the outage */,
  "outage_duration" REAL /* Duration of the outage in hours */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Cause of the outage */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the outage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outages_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
